regions.text: Here are the other fifteen words. They go like this: Past, Present, Future. had/have/will have; did/do/will do; seemed/seem/will seem; came/come/will come; went/go/will go; put/put/will put; took/take/will take; gave/give/will give; got/get/will get; kept/keep/will keep; let/let/will let; made/make/will make; sent/send/will send; saw/see/will see; said/say/will say.
